example.question: In this graph, list the descendant offerings of Analytics Studio for the companies in scope.
example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(:BusinessSegment)-[:OFFERS]->(root:Offering)
MATCH (root)-[:OFFERS*0..]->(o:Offering)
WHERE root.name IN $offerings AND root.company_name = c.name AND o.company_name = c.name
RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS company, o.name AS offering ORDER BY company, offering
